x-enumeration-literals.name: Principal Only Rollover Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Only the original principal amount is rolled over into the new term, while the interest earned is paid out separately.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Principal Plus Interest Rollover Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Both principal and accrued interest are combined and rolled over into the new period, increasing the base amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Rollover Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Only a portion of the matured amount is rolled over, while the remainder is paid to the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjusted Balance Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description: The rollover amount is recalculated after deducting fees, taxes, or charges.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repriced Rollover Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description: The rollover amount remains the same, but interest is recalculated based on a new interest rate for the next period.
